question_text: Let 𝑓: ℝଶ→ℝ be a function defined by 𝑓(𝑥, 𝑦) = ቐ 𝑥ଶ𝑦 𝑥ଶ+ 𝑦ଶ, (𝑥, 𝑦) ≠(0,0), 0, (𝑥, 𝑦) = (0,0). Then which one of the following statements is true?

options.A: 𝑓 is bounded and డ௫ is unbounded on ℝଶ
options.B: 𝑓 is unbounded and డ௫ is bounded on ℝଶ
options.C: Both 𝑓 and డ௫ are unbounded on ℝଶ
options.D: Both 𝑓 and డ௫ are bounded on ℝଶ Page 13
